mapper.sql: SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, DELIVERY_NUMBERS, QUANTITY, TON, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, SPECS, PERMIT_THROUGH, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE
mapper.select: SELECT a.ID, a.TRUST_ID, a.CARGO_INFO_ID, a.DIRECTION, a.QUANTITY, a.TON, a.CARGO_OWNER_ID, a.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, a.CARGO_AGENT_ID, a.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, a.CARGO_CODE, a.CARGO_NAME, a.PACKING_CODE, a.PACKING_NAME, a.CREATE_BY, a.CREATE_BY_NAME, a.CREATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_BY, a.UPDATE_BY_NAME, a.UPDATE_TIME, b.WORK_TYPE, a.CONTRACT_ID, a.CONTRACT_NAME, a.CONTRACT_RATE_ID, a.RATE, a.EST_AMOUNT, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, a.BUSINESS_NO, a.HATCHS, a.IS_SECOND_WEIGH, a.PRINT_POUND_ID, a.PRINT_POUND_NUM, a.RATE_LABEL, a.STATUS FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO a inner join m_cargo b on a.CARGO_CODE = b.CARGO_CODE LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON a.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID where a.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} ORDER BY a.BUSINESS_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE(ID, DELIVERY_NUMBERS, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, QUANTITY, TON, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, SPECS, PERMIT_THROUGH, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryNumbers, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ton, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specs, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{permitThrough, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE
SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DELIVERY_NUMBERS = #{deliveryNumbers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUANTITY = #{quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_CODE = #{packingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_NAME = #{packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECS = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PERMIT_THROUGH = #{permitThrough,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

begin
UPDATE T_BUS_DISPATCH_RELEASE SET
SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{item.shipvoyageId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{item.shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DELIVERY_NUMBERS = #{item.deliveryNumbers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUANTITY = #{item.quantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TON = #{item.ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_CODE = #{item.packingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PACKING_NAME = #{item.packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECS = #{item.specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PERMIT_THROUGH = #{item.permitThrough,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{item.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{item.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{item.now}
id = #{item.id};
end;
